horoscope: Your mind tunes into progressive ideas and possible areas for improvement today, dear Aries. You can be privy to some exciting news or revelations, possibly about business or money. You might hear of something that was previously hidden, which helps jump-start your thinking. With today's Mercury-Uranus transits, open-mindedness is rewarded. Today is strong for distinguishing between pure intuition and restless stirrings. This can be a time of new developments or unusual events surrounding business or financial matters, as well as innovative insights. Your direction may shift a little now as a result of ideas or news coming to you today. You're sociable and curious. As well, family matters seem to be strengthening, and you can feel more dedication to working things through. Your instincts for success are strong right now.

You're feeling grounded today, dear Taurus, but you're also open to new ideas with Mercury and Uranus harmonizing. This transit rewards open minds. It's a good time for playing with ideas before putting them into motion, and for paying particular attention to ideas that appear to come to you out of the blue. It's a day of interesting synchronicity or surprise. Inventive new ideas, dreams, and possibilities can figure strongly now. Look to friends and group activities for opportunities to mingle. Creative thinking can emerge as you let your mind go. A helpful conversation, invitation, or piece of news may be a pleasant surprise! There seem to be many options open to you, and good energy for detaching yourself a little, helping you detox and let go of accumulated stress. There is very good energy with you today for a sense of purpose and more substantial commitments in friendships or with projects. You can feel more dedicated to a long-term goal, cause, or dream, ready to accept the work involved in getting to where you want to go.

There can be interesting insight into a relationship today, dear Gemini, and you can be taking a good look at the hidden layers of a situation, project, or person. You could tackle resentments since you see issues from a somewhat detached perspective today. It's also a good time to become better informed with exciting ideas circulating. You're bringing inventiveness and unique insight to the day. Still, you're interested in tangible results and rewards. Excellent energy is with you to help you feel a stronger sense of purpose or mission in practical or business areas. As such, minor issues aren’t going to bring you down. You have your eye on more important things! Getting organized and learning to recognize your talents are themes in your life right now.

With a Mercury-Uranus transit today, you see many possibilities, dear Cancer, and this feels great rather than overwhelming. It's a fine time for entertaining new ideas and making new plans, and friendships are stimulating and lively. Networking can lead to useful and pleasant discoveries. Mingling can be refreshing now, and you can enjoy some food for thought. You can also feel that you’re on a mission today, and it helps you rise above tension. Projects or work that is especially meaningful may be at the root of this, or you get the sense that you are working towards something substantial and satisfying.

There can be good opportunities to communicate and connect with others today, dear Leo, with Mercury in harmony with Uranus. You are more intuitive these days, and today, you feel good about opening your mind, even with tricky subject matter. Business and career matters can improve with research and discoveries. You have many channels for self-expression available today. Others are more cooperative, appreciative, and tolerant than usual. Long-term planning can be most attractive and rewarding today, particularly in financial, emotional, or mental health matters. You can feel very committed to getting on top of things in your personal life, and this sense of a mission can help you rise above recent problems. There is good energy for optimism and innovation. You can enjoy new insights and a true sense that you can get over problems that have been hindering your progress.

The Moon spends the day in your partnership sector, dear Virgo, spotlighting your relationship needs. It's not the most decisive time of the lunar month, but it's a good period for considering other perspectives. As well, your motivation is strong, and work, duties, or routines can thrive as a result. Interactions with people close to you can be animated and stimulating. Conversations are refreshingly open, honest, and revealing. It's a time to learn or teach something new and perhaps gain some inspiration by experimenting with alternative or out-of-the-ordinary activities. You're in great shape for consulting with others, increasing your understanding of a special person in your life, or coming up with bold new ideas for the future. Detaching just a little from a situation gives it a fun, positive spin. The mood is primarily optimistic, and you can have a real sense that others are on your side. Commitment or dedication to a person or a cause can make you feel terrific about yourself and your future.

Today's energies are strong for clearing something up or releasing tension, dear Libra. You can gain valuable insights or make unique discoveries about health, work, habits, and routine matters. Your thinking is ahead of the times, and your mind can take you to unusual places today. You might readily shrug off life's minor inconveniences and challenges, and it feels great to do so. You're likely to enjoy positive vibes while pursuing your daily routines or in your work. Pleasant surprises can surround intimate relationships or attachments. Commitment and dedication to your work or long-term goals can be strong, giving you a good sense of mission and something to work toward.

Today's transits are strong for enjoying freer, more accepting relationships with important people in your life, dear Scorpio. You may be putting more time or energy into helping others and making things run smoothly in your personal life. With Mercury and Uranus harmonizing in your relationship sectors, a mutual understanding can emerge, or stimulating conversations can be in the spotlight. You might also come up with an exciting new plan or idea. Minds are opening to new possibilities today, and this can help you solve problems. A development with a special person in your life can prompt a detour or a change, but can also be most welcome. You have a bigger mission and larger goals that help lift your spirits above recent problems. These are likely to revolve around plans for more extensive adventures, learning, publishing, and perhaps romance. Consider ways to take advantage of the nice balance between practicality and optimism that transits today offer you.

The Moon spends the day in your home and family sector, dear Sagittarius, inclining you to enjoy familiar activities, but your mind is wide open to possibilities. There can be a pleasant clearing of the air today, in fact, or an answer to a question that makes you feel stronger and more confident. You're feeling friendly and perhaps looking for some feedback from someone special. Others are cooperative. Work and habits require an innovative approach right now, and the desire to make changes is strong. Ideas for doing so can come on today, and they're wonderfully unique. Being open and forthcoming with family can be rewarding now, or you're approaching your interactions in a new, fresh way. Reasoning things out comes more easily than usual today as Mercury and Uranus harmonize. This transit encourages creative, progressive thinking and conversations. You're letting go and moving forward, at least on a mental level. Through honest conversations and realizations, you can get to a place of far greater understanding. You might discover a new method or gadget that adds a bit of freshness to your day.

With the Moon in your solar third house all day, dear Capricorn, your desire to share and communicate comes to the foreground. Today's energies are strong for inspiration and for discovering needs or wants you previously didn't acknowledge. People are attracted to your unique perspective, and you might provide some unique guidance to others. Open and honest conversations can be in focus today. Learning endeavors bring you joy, and channels of communication open. News from a love interest could be pleasantly unexpected. You gravitate toward the most practical solutions to problems and toward constructive projects or endeavors. Today’s transits support satisfying progress on projects dear to your heart, and with more meaningfulness, you are all the more dedicated.

With Mercury's sextile to Uranus today, dear Aquarius, freeform thinking and musing can lead you to creative places. Progressive ideas about how to make yourself feel more secure or comfortable can emerge today. An open and honest atmosphere with loved ones can promote healthy conversations, cooperation, and solutions to problems. You can come to some highly interesting conclusions and ideas. You're in fine shape for home improvement, interesting purchases, and discovering new tastes and interests. Detaching yourself from a situation for a spell can help you gain a new perspective. You’re in a good emotional place, and tapping into longer-term goals can be motivating, mainly related to work and improving your finances. Your confidence and willingness to work toward your goals positively impact your personal income, career, and health.

The Moon spends the day in your sign, dear Pisces, and your personal plans and emotional needs are on the front burner. There can be exciting new avenues opening up for expressing yourself, getting around, or connecting as Mercury harmonizes with Uranus. The chance to enjoy conversations about the things that genuinely interest you can emerge. You could be making valuable connections or receiving an invitation. Using the power of words to attract what you want or to further your interests works best for you now. There can be nice opportunities for creative productivity, meaningful relationships, and personal advancement. Today’s energies are a mix of play and work for you, and finding the perfect balance between these two things can make for a successful day.
